positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a cosmic creature—a celestial fox spirit with luminous, ethereal fur and striking sapphire eyes. The creature is floating within a geometric constellation pattern, outlined by glowing gold filigree lines. The background is deep indigo and velvety black, contrasted by vibrant nebula swirls of teal, magenta, and gold. The composition is central, featuring a strong silhouette against a contrasting glow. Style: Japanese Ukiyo-e meets vaporwave geometry, high contrast, flat graphic design, screen print quality, vector art details. Perfect for t-shirt printing. Cinematic lighting, ethereal glow, sharp focus, symmetrical composition.
